subject: LU-5740 build: add RHEL6.6 [2.6.32-504.el6] to build selections

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/28877/

Patch Set 1:

for backporting purposes it may make more sense to just go directly to 2.6.32-504.1.3 by incorporating the content of http://review.whamcloud.com/12815 in this mod rather than doing another separate landing.  just a suggestion.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 
 
https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/28877/ : FAILURE

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

think build failure is due to variation in ldiskfs patch names between master and b2_5. there was a mod in master that changed over all '_' in patch names to '-'. for example ext4_data_in_dirent became ext4-data-in-dirent. can be fixed by either including the content from that mod or fixing the patch names in the new 6.6 series to the ones in b2_5.

Patch Set 1:

Updating the patch I noticed ext4-mmp.patch is missing in the rhel6.6 series. Is this correct?

Patch Set 1:

yes, correct.  I believe the changes done by that patch are now already present in the upstream ext4 code in the 6.6 kernel.
Uploaded patch set 2.
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

But can we also add in this patch fix for OFED ?
lnet/autoconf/lustre-lnet.m4:430
2.6.32-504*)
	EXTRA_OFED_INCLUDE="$EXTRA_OFED_INCLUDE -DCONFIG_COMPAT_RHEL_6_4 -DCONFIG_COMPAT_RHEL_6_5"
	EXTRA_OFED_INCLUDE="$EXTRA_OFED_INCLUDE -DCONFIG_COMPAT_RHEL_6_6";;

parents.subject: LU-0000 build: update build version to 2.5.3.90

commit.subject: LU-5740 build: add RHEL6.6 [2.6.32-504.el6] to build selections
commit.message:
LU-5740 build: add RHEL6.6 [2.6.32-504.el6] to build selections

Add support for building with RHEL6.6 kernel version 2.6.32-504.el6
while retaining the ability to build with older RHEL 6.5 kernels.
New ldiskfs patch series for el6.6 is included.

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el6.6 mdsdistro=el6.6\
  ossdistro=el6.6 mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs\
  mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs

Lustre-commit: 1ba98baf8be1622464faca80ffaeec7a01a04978
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/12609

LU-6162 kernel: kernel update RHEL6.6 [2.6.32-504.8.1.el6]

Update RHEL6.6 kernel to 2.6.32-504.8.1.el6

Lustre-commit: dd520a37ad28c94921d3bb1444449967d95d72e8
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/13560

Signed-off-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Change-Id: I780feefbbc179607762c0d2997fd608830f3db8b
Reviewed-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
